_comment: 2AIO Codex model router. Picks the cheapest Codex tier that fits a delegated implementation task, so delegation defaults to Terra/Luna instead of the expensive Sol. Priority: sol (only when explicitly hard) > luna (mechanical/bulk) > terra (default). Model IDs verified from the local codex install.

sol.reason: hard implementation needing deep reasoning — use sparingly (expensive)

signals.many_files_regex: (全ファイル|across .*files|multiple files|複数ファイル|N files|batch)
